title: The Public Records Act, 1993
full_text: The Public Records Act, 1993 लोक अभिलेख अधिनियम,1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199369 Act Number: 69 Enactment Date: 1993-12-21 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The Public Records Act, 1993 Hindi Title: लोक अभिलेख अधिनियम,1993 Long Title: An Act to regulate the management, administration and preservation of public records of the Central Government, Union territory Administrations, public sector undertakings, statutory bodies and corporations, commissions and committees constituted by the Central Government or a Union territory Administration and matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 01-03-1995 Notification: 1st March, 1995, vide notification No. S.O. 128(E), dated 1st March, 1995, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Public Records Act, 1993 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Power of the Central Government to coordinate, regulate and supervise operations connected with administration, management, etc., of public records. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Prohibition against taking of public records out of India. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Records officer. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Responsibilities of records officer. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Records officer to take appropriate action in the event of unauthorised removal, destruction, etc., of public records in his custody. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Destruction or disposal of public records. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Penalty for contraventions. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Public records bearing security classification. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Receipt of records from private sources. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Access to public records. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Archival Advisory Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Functions of the Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Power of the Director General to lay down norms and standards for courses in archival science. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Protection of action taken in good faith. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Laying of rules before Parliament.
